description: Updatron appears to operate an "Updater Internet Store" service. Public developer materials were not found on updatron.com, but a remote MCP endpoint is publicly reachable and requires OAuth-based authorization.
summary: Updatron exposes a known remote MCP server at https://ai-agents.infra.updatron.com/mcp, authenticated via OAuth; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs were found.
